response.justification: Bogdan has strong distributed systems and high-throughput experience (e.g., data integration team handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby media), leadership in technical strategy roles (Staff positions at re:cinq and Altom), and hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators at re:cinq). His technical breadth (multiple languages, systems, and domains) and operational readiness (CI/CD, TDD, incident response) align well with the role. However, his recent Staff role is very new (April 2025), and his AI-native experience, while present, is not deeply documented beyond tooling contributions.
strengths: Proven expertise in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures (Dunnhumby, GISCollective)
Leadership in technical strategy and architecture (Staff roles, open-source project leadership)
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (re:cinq, MCP)
concerns: Recent Staff role may lack depth in operational ownership (only 3 months at re:cinq)
Limited explicit mention of agile scrum champion or cross-functional stakeholder management
AI-native experience is present but not a primary focus in resume (mostly tooling/contributions)
